THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNNE, LIM MULLIN, SHANE ORR, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 493 HAIGHT STREET, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $7,770.29 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,770.29, STAYED UNTIL JAN-27-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, $6092.BACK RENT PLUS $1678.29 UD DAMAGES TOTAL $7770.29; S/E UNTIL 27JAN98 5 PM.
